name: TierB_x_TierD_BorderRank_x_PhaseTransition
notes: First independent confirmation of Tier-B + Tier-D cross-tier composition. Tensor-PCA threshold cluster: BorderRankWitness composes with PhaseTransitionThreshold to certify a constructive existence claim that holds within a stated distributional regime.

name: TierB_x_TierD_BorderRank_x_GenericityAE
notes: Second independent confirmation. AOP/CO-V identifiability with the explicit measure-zero exception list (6,2,9), (4,3,8), (3,5,9). Together with C-001, these two confirmations elevate the Tier-B + Tier-D composition pattern from speculation to required substrate architecture.

name: TierB_x_TierE_GCT_Obstruction
notes: Architecturally required: substrate-tester refuses to load a GCT-flavour Tier-B primitive without an upstream Tier-E RepresentationTheoreticInvariant. Awaits T#95 cluster registration in v4.0 Wave 4 before promoting to confirmed.

name: TierAplusplus_x_TierB_TensorNetwork_x_BorderRank
notes: Future candidate. Once TensorNetwork registers (v4.0 Wave 1), every Tier-B rank witness will need to declare which TensorNetwork it lives over. Promotion to confirmed gated on Wave 1 completion.

name: TierC_x_TierB_Defectivity_x_Waring
notes: Future candidate. ABGO 2024 closure of Segre-Veronese defectivity for d_i >= 3 supplies fat-point witnesses that WaringRankWitness can consume. Awaits Tier-C registration.

name: TierD_x_TierD_RandomTensor_x_PhaseTransition
notes: Future candidate intra-tier composition. The type-2 tensor constant (T#72) is a sister to the tensor-PCA threshold (T#73); a registered intra-Tier-D composition would let downstream operators inherit the regime annotation from both.

name: TierE_x_TierE_KroneckerInvariant_x_PartitionObject
notes: Future candidate intra-tier composition. Sellke's Saxl resolution depends on partition-indexed Kronecker invariants; a registered composition primitive would package the (partition, kronecker_value) pair as a single typed object that GCTObstructionCertificate (C-003) can consume.
